reflection.summary: User asked to list all available tools; assistant enumerated 38 tools across 12 categories.
lessons: Tool counts can drift — verify categorization matches actual toolset before claiming totals.
User asked for available tools, not tool descriptions. List names first, details on request.
recommendations: Keep a canonical, versioned tool manifest for accurate enumeration.
When listing tools, offer: compact (names only) vs verbose (with descriptions). Let user choose.
